metadata.name: Handle a Backordered Item on an Order

description: A customer places an order for an item that is currently out of stock. An agent must manage the backorder.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically flags the order line item as backordered.

expected_outcome.value: The order is placed on hold pending stock arrival.

nodes.task_description: Notify the customer of the backorder and provide the estimated in-stock date.

expected_outcome.value: An automated email is sent to the customer with the backorder information.

nodes.task_description: When the item arrives from the supplier, automatically release the backorder for fulfillment.

expected_outcome.value: The system allocates the new stock to the backorder and sends it to the warehouse for picking.
